documentation.value:
Combines multiple arrays or strings into one.
```bicep
var combined = concat('Hello', ' ', 'World') // 'Hello World'
var arr = concat([1, 2], [3, 4]) // [1, 2, 3, 4]
```
First array or string.
Second array or string.
Additional arrays or strings to concatenate.

Returns the number of elements in an array, characters in a string, or properties in an object.
```bicep
var len = length('hello') // 5
var arrLen = length([1, 2, 3]) // 3
```
An array, string, or object to measure.

Checks whether an array, object, or string contains a value.
```bicep
var result = contains('Hello World', 'World') // true
var has = contains([1, 2, 3], 2) // true
```
An array, object, or string to search in.
The value, key, or substring to find.

Determines if an array, object, or string is empty.
```bicep
var isEmpty = empty('') // true
var isArrEmpty = empty([]) // true
```
An array, object, or string to check.

Returns the first element of an array or first character of a string.
```bicep
var f = first([1, 2, 3]) // 1
var c = first('hello') // 'h'
```
An array or string.

Returns the last element of an array or last character of a string.
```bicep
var l = last([1, 2, 3]) // 3
var c = last('hello') // 'o'
```
An array or string.

Returns the union of multiple arrays or objects (combined with duplicates removed for arrays).
```bicep
var u = union([1, 2], [2, 3]) // [1, 2, 3]
var o = union({a: 1}, {b: 2}) // {a: 1, b: 2}
```
First array or object.
Second array or object.
Additional arrays or objects.

Returns common elements from arrays or common properties from objects.
```bicep
var common = intersection([1, 2, 3], [2, 3, 4]) // [2, 3]
```
First array or object.
Second array or object.
Additional arrays or objects.

Returns the unique resource identifier of a resource.
```bicep
var id = resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', 'myStorage')
```
The resource type including namespace (e.g. `'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'`).
The name of the resource.
Optional child resource name segments.

Creates a deterministic hash string (13 chars) based on input values. Useful for creating unique resource names.
```bicep
var unique = uniqueString(resourceGroup().id) // e.g. 'a1b2c3d4e5f6g'
var name = 'storage${uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)}'
```
The base value used to create a unique string.
Additional strings to combine for uniqueness.

Returns details of the current subscription.
```bicep
var subId = subscription().subscriptionId
var tenantId = subscription().tenantId
```

Returns details of the current resource group.
```bicep
var rgName = resourceGroup().name
var rgLocation = resourceGroup().location
```
